purpose: User-invocable entry point. plugins/base/commands/next.md is a Markdown prompt file that the Claude Code harness reads at runtime. It dispatches the top actionable BACKLOG.md finding to the appropriate sub-workflow. This story adds argument parsing (Step 0) and creates the ModeVariable seam consumed by S2 and S3.

public_api.name: argument-hint
public_api.description: YAML frontmatter field declaring the command's argument grammar to callers and the harness.

public_api.name: Step 0: Parse Mode Argument
public_api.signature: IF $ARGUMENTS empty/whitespace → mode = 'detail'; IF $ARGUMENTS == 'auto' (exact) → mode = 'auto'; ELSE → exit with usage hint
public_api.description: ModeVariable seam: Step 0 sets mode before any other step executes. mode is exactly one of 'detail' or 'auto'. Consumed by Step 4 (S2) and Step 4a (S3).

public_api.name: allowed-tools
public_api.signature: Read, Edit, Bash, AskUserQuestion, Skill, Grep
public_api.description: YAML frontmatter field enumerating the tools the command is permitted to use. Grep is added by this story.

owned_data: mode variable (in-session): string literal 'detail' or 'auto', set by Step 0, consumed by Step 4
events_emitted: ModeVariable seam: mode ∈ {'detail', 'auto'} set at Step 0 for consumption by S2/S3 Step 4
test_targets: plugins/base/commands/next.md — Read-based textual assertion by base:verification-examiner: (1) frontmatter argument-hint verbatim, (2) Grep in allowed-tools, (3) description mentions both modes, (4) Step 0 heading before Step 1, (5) Step 0 empty-branch sets mode=detail, (6) Step 0 auto-branch sets mode=auto (case-sensitive), (7) Step 0 else-branch exits with usage hint naming /base:next and /base:next auto
